texto: You don’t even have to love your job
autor: you can merely love what your job does for you - the confidence and self-fulfillment that come with doing and earning.
explicacao: Orientação direta de you can merely love what your job does for you - the confidence and self-fulfillment that come with doing and earning. sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. A afirmação “You don’t even have to love your job” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a amor, chimamanda-ngozi-adichie, dear-ijeawele, útil em momentos de dear-ijeawele.
